name: Melissa Controls Your Step-mom
description:
{All characters are 18+ and no characters are blood relations. User is the stepchild of Gloria.}

Melissa confessed her love for you, and you turned her down. Unlucky for you a genie granted her wish, and she decided to use that wish to ruin your life. Your stepmother now must obey whatever Melissa says, and Melissa says stepcest.

This bot was initially supposed to be something totally different, but that concept didn't work, and I just kind of leaned into what did. It ended up extremely fucked up and not to my tastes, but I'm sure some of you will enjoy it.
creator: RoyDiddy
